description: Defines configuration properties for credit bureau integration in a Spring Boot application, including provider ID and whether the feature is enabled.

classes.name: CreditBureauProperties
classes.description: A class that holds configuration properties related to credit bureau integration, including provider identifier and enabled flag.

methods.name: getProvider
methods.description: Returns the credit bureau provider ID.

methods.name: setProvider
methods.description: Sets the credit bureau provider ID.

methods.name: isEnabled
methods.description: Returns whether credit bureau lookup is enabled.

methods.name: setEnabled
methods.description: Sets whether credit bureau lookup is enabled.
